clauses.title: Services
clauses.body: Vendor will provide cloud hosting services with 99.9% uptime guarantee.

clauses.title: Payment
clauses.body: Client agrees to pay $5,000/month. Payment due within 60 days of invoice.

clauses.title: Data Ownership
clauses.body: All data uploaded by Client to Vendor platform remains property of the Vendor unless otherwise agreed in writing.

clauses.title: Liability
clauses.body: Vendor total liability shall not exceed one month service fee of $5,000 regardless of the nature of the claim.

clauses.title: Auto-Renewal
clauses.body: Contract automatically renews annually unless cancelled 90 days before expiry.

critical_flags.description: Client data becomes vendor property - unacceptable for any business

high_flags.description: Liability capped at $5,000 which is far too low for a hosting contract
Contract may not be enforceable without vendor signature
